content.text:
{"name": "write_file", "arguments": {"path": "solution.py", "content": "# Import required libraries
import asyncio
from collections import deque
time = asyncio.get_running_loop().time

class RateLimiter:
    def __init__(self, max_calls_per_second):
        self.max_calls_per_second = max_calls_per_second
        self.tokens = deque()
        self.lock = asyncio.Lock()

    async def acquire(self):
        now = time()
        with await self.lock:
            while self.tokens and self.tokens[0] + 1 < now:
                self.tokens.popleft()
            if len(self.tokens) >= self.max_calls_per_second:
                next_call_time = self.tokens[-1] + 1
                wait_time = next_call_time - now
                await asyncio.sleep(wait_time)
            self.tokens.append(now)}}"}
